roa.docketEntryComment: /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1/GTW///CONTINUED TO SET TRIAL,//H1:940902/0900/S22
/SEE MINUTES OF 11-07-95, DEPARTMENT 25,///THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
MOTION BY PEO(LACK OF EVIDENCE-DISM PURS 1385PC
CONT TO 11/7/95 FOR FUR PTC AT 845AM IN D25
DEFT'S APP WVD;CONT 10/26/95 845AM D25 FOR PTC
CONT TO 10/19/95 FOR FUR PTC AT 845AM IN D25
BAIL SET $10,000;TRIAL DATE VAC;CONT 11/13/95 930AM D22 TRIALCONT 9/27/95 845AM D25 FOR PTC
CONT 9/21/95 11AM D25 FOR BAIL DETERMINATION
/TRANS 25 FW: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//TR:951016/0930/S22
/MO TO CONT:BY D,A/CONTS GTW/MO GRTD//PC:950920/1400/S22/TR:951016/0930/S22
/X:CAUSE ON CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO CONTINUE BY DEFENSE,//CONTS GTW/MO GRTD//PC:950614/1400/S22/TR:950626/0930/S22
MO CONT-GRTD;CONT GTW;CONT 3/29/95 1030 PTC,4/24/95 FOR TRL 930AM IN D22
CONT 2/21/95 FOR TRIAL & TOBE SET  AT 930AM IN D22
MO LEAVE W/D AS ATTY 284CCP-GRTD;VACATED 2/9/95 IN D22CONT 2/16/95 FOR TOBE SET & FOR CNSL AT 9AM IN D22
MOTION TO CONSOL-GRTD;ORAL MO TO W/D AS CNSL-DENIED
SUPPL MO PTC DISCOV PURS 1043EC-O/C
DEFT MO 995PC DEN;DEFT APPEAR WVD BY HIS ATTYMO TRAVERS AFFIDAVIT OF WARRANT DEN;TRANSF TO D22 F/W
DEFT OR;CONT 10/19/94 1030AM FOR PTC & TS NEW TRL DATE IN D22
CONT GTW;CRT APPTS DR LEVY & KESSLER TO EXAM DEFT PURS 730/1017ECCONT 9/30/94 FOR TS NEW TRIAL & RPT AT 9AM IN D22
CONT TO 9/9/94 FOR TBS/TO BE HEARD W/154638 & 156414 AT 9AM IN D22
INDICT RET-8/17/94;CONT TO 8/22/94 FOR ARR/CNSL IN D22 AT 9AM
